title: Note This!
description: A client side mod that allows you type notes about players in multiplayer.
body:
![Note This banner](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://res.cloudinary.com/dtrgnyly6/image/upload/v1765902766/model_zf78jj.png&w=300&h=300)

Whether it's solving murder mysteries or simply noting down coordinates to people bases, with Note This!, you can write notes about any player on a server, including yourself! A nice and simple mod for anyone who needs to note down things about players. ### Now supports NeoForge! ### And Quilt! # Features: - Favouriting - Adding notes - Pinning notes - Searchable players - A customisable keybind to open the notes screen (Default: N) # Dependencies: - Fabric API: https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api - Fabric and Quilt Only! - Cloth Config API: https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config - NeoForge, Fabric, and Quilt! # Want to report bugs or request a feature? **Do it here -->** [Issues](https://github.com/jacobxny/Issues/issues)
